name: core.openwop.agents.support-triage
description: Customer support triage agent. Categorizes inbound tickets, routes to the right queue, surfaces severity + customer-segment signals. Pure-agent pack.
author: OpenWOP Working Group

agents.label: Support Triage Agent
agents.description: Reads a support ticket (subject + body + optional customer metadata) and emits a routing decision: queue, severity, customer-segment-aware priority, suggested skill-tags, and a short rationale.
